quantity: Koide ratio Q_K = (sum m)/(sum sqrt m)^2 of the foam-soliton mass operators
value_status: numerically supported at ~1% in the 2D continuum (Stratum 2); 3D Hopfion remains as cross-check

local_higgs_n3.note: local Higgs overlap baseline; stays near degenerate 1/3

lattice_scan.extrapolation: Q_K(L) = Q_inf + c/L over valid (n_zero=|Q|) points

soliton_zero_modes.note: energy-minimising axially-symmetric / Z3-lobed solitons give ~0.41-0.45, NOT 2/3; the value is the equal-weight (coherence) normalisation, a different variational statement
